race.description: Lachlan River Produce Country Boosted C1 Handicap
race.comment: TASSALINA (4) was a solidly-backed $2.10 favourite on debut last start over 1000m at Wagga and the money was right. After settling worse than midfield she pulled wide then quickened like a good horse to win by 3.3 lengths. Will eat up the extra 100m and looks the one to beat again. BOSCO (3) hasn't been all that far away since winning his maiden three back. Produced a career-best figure two starts ago when beaten under two lengths over this distance at Goulburn. Nicely drawn so everything points towards a big run. Lightly raced mare MOLTEUNO (8) is back for a second campaign after a 171-day lay-off. Made nice progress when last in work and should come back bigger and better this prep. OUTLAW ANNIE (5) has been chopping and changing distances. Best effort was the maiden win over 1000m at Orange three back. This looks a nice fit. RITA RED (10) just missed in a weak race at Holbrook last time. Rough top four hope.
